title: Chara's Vibrant Shaders
description: A light but somewhat high quality Shader. It has a lot of visual bugs, as this is my first ever shader. the options screen is also a bit weird but like i said its my first ever shader. This whole thing took around 2 weeks to complete due to bug fixing.
body:
Chara’s Vibrant Shaders feels like a world turned up too far—colors too bright, light too intense, everything just a little unstable. Greens glow almost unnaturally, water shimmers like liquid glass, and the sky bleeds vivid shades into the horizon. It’s beautiful in a loud, overwhelming way, like reality trying to outdo itself.

But it never quite settles. Light flickers when it shouldn’t, shadows shift unpredictably, and parts of the world seem to glitch or warp for a moment before snapping back. Sometimes it looks broken—other times, accidentally perfect.

It’s vibrant, messy, and unpredictable. Like something that wasn’t meant to work, but somehow does anyway.

It's very buggy with contrast and night time but during the day it works out. the godrays are also very buggy.
